basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has released the official Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 notification under Advertisement No. NP40014020260707093401 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026. Candidates holding an M.Tech. in relevant Engineering disciplines or a Master's degree in Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Engineering Science, or Chemical Science with a valid GATE/ NET score are eligible to apply through email on or before 04 August 2026. The official notification PDF and application detai

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering/ Chemical Technology/ Ceramic Engineering/ Production/ Mechanical/ other suitable Engineering/ Master's in Chemistry/ Applied Chemistry/ Engineering Science/ Chemical Science with GATE/ NET score. Knowledge in ceramic membrane formation/ formulation, porous material, mass transfer through porous materials, membrane preparation, membrane process, water treatment, and/or knowledge of separation technology.
qualification.details: M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering/ Chemical Technology/ Ceramic Engineering/ Production/ Mechanical/ other suitable Engineering/Master's in Chemistry/ Applied Chemistry/ Engineering Science/ Chemical Science with GATE/ NET score. Knowledge in ceramic membrane formation/formulation, porous material, mass transfer through porous materials, membrane preparation, membrane process, water treatment, and/or knowledge of separation technology.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37000 per month for 2 years + Rs. 42000/month as SRF for 6 months

selection_process: Interview (Offline at IIT Roorkee Saharanpur Campus or Online via Webex)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee JRF Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Roorkee JRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Tech. in Chemical Engineering/ Chemical Technology/ Ceramic Engineering/ Production/ Mechanical/ other suitable Engineering/Master's in Chemistry/ Applied Chemistry/ Engineering Science/ Chemical Science with GATE/ NET score. Knowledge in ceramic membrane formation/formulation, porous material, mass transfer through porous materials, membrane preparation, membrane process, water treatment, and/or knowledge of separation technology.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 37000 per month for 2 years + Rs. 42000/month as SRF for 6 months

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Interview (Offline at IIT Roorkee Saharanpur Campus or Online via Webex)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee JRF Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Roorkee JRF recruitment is 04 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Tech. in relevant engineering fields or a Master's in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Engineering Science/Chemical Science with a valid GATE/NET score.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 37000 per month for the first two years, which will be enhanced to Rs. 42000 per month as a Senior Research Fellow (SRF) for the subsequent six months.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this JRF position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on an interview, which can be conducted offline at IIT Roorkee Saharanpur Campus or online via Webex.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this JRF position?
faq.answer: The JRF position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the IIT Roorkee Saharanpur Campus located?
faq.answer: The IIT Roorkee Saharanpur Campus is located in Saharanpur, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247001.

faq.question: Q9. What specific knowledge is preferred for the JRF role?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to candidates with knowledge in ceramic membrane formation/formulation, porous materials, mass transfer, membrane preparation, water treatment, and separation technology.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be an age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed notification for any age-related information.
